title: lolium multiflorum subsp. gaudinii
intro: Lolium multiflorum subsp. gaudinii, also known as Italian ryegrass, is a subspecies of Lolium multiflorum, a type of grass native to Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its saponin content. The health benefits of Italian ryegrass include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and providing antioxidant protection against cell damage. Italian ryegrass can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or dried extract, often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
